reasoning: Crystal Palace is a mid-table Premier League team with no realistic prospect of winning the title in the 2025-26 season, given the vast financial disparities between them and the top clubs (e.g., Manchester City, Arsenal, Liverpool). Further, they must first avoid relegation in the 2024-25 season just to participate in 2025-26. Even if a massive takeover were to occur, current Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR) prevent the kind of instant squad overhaul needed to win a title immediately. The actual probability is well below 1%, so I am selecting the lowest permissible bound of 0.02.
